name: Goa
tagline: The Land of Sun, Sand, and Sea
description: Famed for its pristine beaches, active nightlife, centuries-old Portuguese churches, and delicious seafood curries.

luxury.name: Taj Exotica Resort & Spa
highlights: Private beach access in South Goa

dining.name: Brittos Bar & Restaurant
dining.specialty: Goan Fish Curry & Butter Garlic Prawns

attractions.name: Baga Beach
attractions.description: Famous North Goa beach known for watersports, shacks, and sunset views.

attractions.name: Basilica of Bom Jesus
attractions.description: UNESCO World Heritage site containing the mortal remains of St. Francis Xavier.

attractions.name: Dudhsagar Waterfalls
attractions.description: A four-tiered majestic waterfall on the Mandovi River, accessible via jeep safaris.

name: Jaipur
description: Immerse yourself in royalty with grand forts, pink sandstone palaces, colourful bazaars, and traditional Rajasthani block printing.

luxury.name: Rambagh Palace (Taj)
highlights: Living in a real palace of Maharaja

attractions.name: Amber Palace
attractions.description: Magnificent fort built on a hill with artistic Hindu-style elements & Sheesh Mahal.

attractions.name: Hawa Mahal
attractions.description: Iconic five-story pink screen wall built for royal women to observe street festivals.

attractions.name: Jantar Mantar
attractions.description: UNESCO astronomical observatory containing the world's largest stone sundial.

name: Manali
description: Nestled on the Beas River, Manali is a gateway for skiing, paragliding, trekking, and exploring the high-altitude Solang Valley.

train.details: Train to Delhi + Volvo bus ride
Train to Delhi + Volvo bus transfer
Train to Delhi + Volvo bus transfer

dining.name: Il Forno
dining.specialty: Wood-fired Pizzas & Pastas in Old Manali

attractions.name: Solang Valley
attractions.description: Adventure hub offering skiing in winter and paragliding/zorbing in summer.

attractions.name: Hadimba Temple
attractions.description: 16th-century wooden temple built around a cave, surrounded by cedar forests.

attractions.name: Atal Tunnel & Sissu
attractions.description: Engineering marvel tunnel leading to the scenic, snowy Lahaul valley landscape.

name: Kerala (Munnar & Alleppey)
description: Lush tea plantations in Munnar hills coupled with tranquil houseboat cruises down the backwaters of Alleppey.

flight.details: Flight to Kochi (COK) + 3h drive to Munnar

attractions.name: Eravikulam National Park
attractions.description: Habitat of the Nilgiri Tahr, offering tea garden views.

attractions.name: Alleppey Backwaters
attractions.description: Network of brackish canals and rivers bordered by palms.

attractions.name: Mattupetty Dam
attractions.description: Concrete gravity dam with boating options.

name: Leh Ladakh
description: Dramatic cold deserts, deep blue lakes like Pangong, ancient Tibetan monasteries, and the highest motorable mountain roads.

flight.details: Scenic direct flight to Leh Kushok Bakula Airport

train.details: Train to Jammu Tawi + 2-day road trip

bus.details: Delhi to Leh Bus via Manali

attractions.name: Pangong Tso Lake
attractions.description: High-altitude lake changing colors from blue to green.

attractions.name: Khardung La Pass
attractions.description: One of the highest motorable roads in the world.

attractions.name: Diskit Monastery
attractions.description: Featuring a 32m Maitreya Buddha statue.

name: Agra
description: Step back in time to the Mughal Empire, witnessing the Taj Mahal, magnificent red sandstone Agra Fort, and historic Fatehpur Sikri.

bus.details: Direct AC coaches via Yamuna Expressway

budget.name: Joeys Hostel Agra
highlights: Walking distance to Taj East Gate

dining.name: Sheroes Hangout
dining.specialty: Local North Indian Meals (Run by survivors)

attractions.name: Taj Mahal
attractions.description: The famous white marble mausoleum built by Shah Jahan.

attractions.name: Agra Fort
attractions.description: Massive 16th-century red sandstone fortress.

attractions.name: Fatehpur Sikri
attractions.description: Ghost city built in red sandstone by Emperor Akbar.

name: Varanasi
description: One of the oldest continuously inhabited cities in the world, renowned for its holy Ganges Ghats, spectacular evening Ganga Aarti, and ancient temples.

train.details: Vande Bharat Express / Shiv Ganga Express

attractions.name: Dashashwamedh Ghat
attractions.description: Spectacular daily Ganga Aarti ritual.

attractions.name: Kashi Vishwanath Temple
attractions.description: Famous Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva.

attractions.name: Sarnath
attractions.description: Historical park where Buddha first taught.

name: Ooty
description: Adorned with rolling green tea gardens, beautiful blue lakes, eucalyptus trees, and the historic Nilgiri Mountain Toy Train.

train.details: Overnight train to Mysore + local bus

attractions.name: Doddabetta Peak
attractions.description: Highest mountain in Nilgiris at 2,637m.

attractions.name: Ooty Botanical Gardens
attractions.description: Sprawling 55-hectare terraced garden.

attractions.name: Nilgiri Mountain Railway
attractions.description: UNESCO world heritage steam toy train.

name: Mumbai
description: A chaotic metropolis of colonial heritage, Bollywood, finance districts, and the Arabian Sea coast.

luxury.name: The Taj Mahal Palace
highlights: Iconic heritage hotel facing Arabian sea

attractions.name: Gateway of India
attractions.description: Bold arch monument built during the British Raj.

attractions.name: Marine Drive
attractions.description: 3km long C-shaped boulevard along the coast.

attractions.name: Elephanta Caves
attractions.description: UNESCO rock-cut cave temples dedicated to Shiva.

name: Srinagar
description: Surrounded by snow-capped mountains, Srinagar is famous for its Dal Lake houseboats, Mughal gardens, and traditional Kashmiri shawls.

train.details: Train to Jammu Tawi + local taxi

attractions.name: Dal Lake Shikara Ride
attractions.description: Iconic wooden boat cruise touring the floating markets.

attractions.name: Shalimar Bagh
attractions.description: Lush terraced garden built by Emperor Jahangir.

attractions.name: Shankaracharya Temple
attractions.description: Ancient Shiva temple offering panoramic views.

name: Hampi
description: An open-world museum of boulder-strewn landscapes, majestic temples, and stone ruins on the banks of Tungabhadra.

dining.name: Mango Tree
dining.specialty: South Indian Veg Thali & Banana Fritters

attractions.name: Virupaksha Temple
attractions.description: Historic 7th-century active temple dedicated to Lord Shiva.

attractions.name: Vittala Temple Stone Chariot
attractions.description: Iconic stone sculpture chariot with musical pillars.

attractions.name: Matanga Hill Sunset
attractions.description: Steep climb offering ruins sunset views.

name: Gangtok
tagline: The Gateway to the Eastern Himalayas
description: Clean mountain air, winding roads, Buddhist monasteries, scenic view points, and views of Mount Kanchenjunga.

train.details: Train to New Jalpaiguri (NJP) + 4h shared taxi

bus.details: Direct AC Sleeper bus to Siliguri

attractions.name: Rumtek Monastery
attractions.description: Seat of the Gyalwang Karmapa Buddhist temple ruins.

attractions.name: Tsomgo Lake
attractions.description: Glacial lake at 3,753m.

attractions.name: Namgyal Institute of Tibetology
attractions.description: Museum dedicated to traditional Tibetan history.
